name_en: 👄FENDI New Mon Tresor Small Bucket Bag, ice white canvas material, featuring same-color FF embossed embroidery and accented with same-color leather. Lined and finished with gold hardware. Includes one long and one short detachable shoulder strap, woven soft Nappa leather, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Model: FD6112, Size: 18*10*12cm.
